sections.paragraph:
Original: אמל

Transliteration: 'âmal

Phonetic: aw-mal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be weak, to droop, to languish, to be exhausted
    1. (Qal) passive participle (of the heart)
      1. to be weak
      2. to droop
    2. (Pulal)
      1. to be or grow feeble
      2. to languish

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 114

Part(s) of speech: Verb
